## Runtime.IRuntimeContext.runtimeConfections property

Gets all runtime confections as an iterable map. Confections are resolved lazily and cached on first access.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly runtimeConfections: ReadonlyMap<ConfectionId, IConfectionBase>;
```
